content:
# Runway vs Pika vs Kaiber: Best AI Video Generator for Creatives 2026

Creatives need AI video tools that give them control while inspiring new ideas. Let's compare the three most creative options!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]: The Professional Choice

[[link:/tools/9|Runway]] offers the most comprehensive suite of AI video tools.

### Runway Strengths
- **Gen-2 models**: The most advanced AI video generation
- **Professional tools**: Motion brush, infinite zoom, and more
- **Editor integration**: Full-featured video editor built-in

**Try Runway**: https://runwayml.com

---

## Pika: The Quick Creator

Pika excels at fast, creative video generation.

### Pika Strengths
- **Text-to-video**: Simple prompt-based generation
- **Animate images**: Bring still images to life
- **Style transfer**: Apply artistic styles to videos

---

## Kaiber: The Music Video Specialist

Kaiber focuses on music-synced videos and artistic expression.

### Kaiber Strengths
- **Audio sync**: Perfect music video creation
- **Artistic styles**: Unique visual aesthetics
- **Storyboarding**: Plan your video scene by scene

---

## Comparison Table

| Feature | [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] | Pika | Kaiber |
|---------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| Price | $12/mo | $8/mo | $10/mo |
| Best For | Professionals | Quick creation | Music videos |
| Gen-2 | Yes | No | No |
| Animate Images | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Audio Sync | Good | Good | Excellent |
| Full Editor | Yes | Basic | Basic |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Professional work**: Choose [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]
- **Quick creativity**: Try Pika
- **Music videos**: Go with Kaiber

Want more comparisons? Check out Pictory vs InVideo vs Fliki
